summary: Tested backend APIs (14 pytest cases) and core frontend flows (landing, signup, dashboard UI, terminal). 8/8 non-LLM backend tests pass. The LLM-dependent flow (generate + artifacts list/get/download) is BLOCKED by two issues: (1) EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget exceeded — provider returns 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.432, Max budget: 0.4', (2) the emergentintegrations LlmChat uses sync litellm.completion, which blocks the FastAPI event loop for the full 60s+ LLM duration, making the server unresponsive to all other requests during generation. Frontend renders beautifully (candy apple red + chrome, geometric fonts) with all 5 categories and streaming terminal, but two required data-testids from the PRD are missing on Dashboard.

critical.issue: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget exhausted — returns 502 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.43241999999999997, Max budget: 0.4'. Cannot generate any artifacts until budget is increased/key replaced.

Event-loop blocking: LlmChat -> litellm.completion is SYNCHRONOUS but called inside async handler. Whole server becomes unresponsive (root GET /api/ took 35s) while any single generate request is in flight. Should use litellm.acompletion or run in threadpool (run_in_executor / asyncio.to_thread).

minor.issue: download_artifact(request=None) default: if someone calls it without ?token AND without Authorization header, 'request.headers' will NoneType-crash instead of returning 401. Make request a required Depends parameter.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing data-testid='el-centro-input' on the prompt textarea (spec requires it).
Missing data-testid='con-ganas-button' on the Forging/Con Ganas submit button (spec requires it).

integration_issues.issue: End-to-end generate flow cannot be verified due to LLM budget exhaustion (upstream 502). Terminal simulation and UI streaming work, but no artifact is ever created/persisted.

action_items: URGENT: Top up / rotate EMERGENT_LLM_KEY — budget exceeded ($0.43/$0.4).
Make LLM call non-blocking: either switch emergentintegrations call to async (acompletion) or wrap chat.send_message in asyncio.to_thread so the event loop isn't frozen for 60s.
Add data-testid='el-centro-input' to the Dashboard textarea and data-testid='con-ganas-button' to the submit button (PRD explicitly lists these).
Fix download_artifact default request=None so unauthenticated hits don't NoneType-crash.
After LLM key is fixed, re-run backend tests to validate generate/list/get/download/path-traversal protection.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 280: sync litellm.completion inside async handler blocks entire event loop — real production hazard (denial-of-service during LLM calls).
server.py line 352: download_artifact(request: Request = None) — default None breaks the header fallback path.
server.py: SYSTEM_PROMPT requires strict JSON but no fallback/retry on malformed JSON — add one retry before giving up.
seed_data_creation: None — users and artifacts created on the fly with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend 502 on /api/artifacts/generate is a budget/infra issue — after the key is topped up, re-run pytest /app/backend/tests/test_arquitecto.py with --timeout 240. Hit the backend via http://localhost:8001 (not external URL) to avoid Kubernetes ingress 60s timeout on long LLM calls. Verify zip download path-traversal protection (all paths prefixed with safe_title). Frontend: add the two missing testids then re-run Playwright generate flow.
rca of the issue: Generate flow fails because (a) LLM provider returns BadGateway 502 after retry: 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.43241999999999997, Max budget: 0.4' — exhausted EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. (b) even when call is in-flight, the sync litellm.completion inside an async handler freezes the entire FastAPI worker, causing unrelated requests (including /api/) to time out at the ingress (60s) and surface as 502 to the caller — amplifying the failure. Mitigation: rotate/top-up the key, then wrap the LLM call with asyncio.to_thread (or use litellm.acompletion) so the loop stays responsive.
